failure_modes.text: Jumping to conclusions can turn speed into the Othello fault where the team moves fast on the wrong framing.
failure_modes.mitigation: Slow down enough to define the framing before moving fast; speed on the wrong hypothesis is the Othello fault.

failure_modes.text: Vanity signals can be misread as validated learning even when they are disconnected from genuine adoption or fit.
failure_modes.source_quote: Danger when teams call any customer contact or usage blip validated learning
failure_modes.mitigation: Distinguish validated learning from vanity metrics; signals that feel positive but are disconnected from real adoption are waste.

failure_modes.text: Availability-style hammer use can lock the team into an MVP pattern that no longer fits the real problem.
failure_modes.mitigation: Check whether the MVP pattern still fits the current problem; availability-style reuse of the lean playbook can lock the team into a format that no longer serves.

premortem_questions.text: What would you have to believe?
Which assumptions about demand, fit, or behavior would force a pivot rather than a continuation?
premortem_questions.source_quote: used to trigger real continuation, pivot, or kill decisions

heuristics.text: Gather only enough facts to prove or disprove the current product hypothesis instead of boiling the ocean.
heuristics.source_quote: only enough facts to prove or disprove the hypothesis

heuristics.text: Define the beachhead clearly so the team bites off a foothold before chasing the larger vision.
Use empathy maps or journey evidence to make the measure phase about real users rather than internal guesses.
heuristics.source_quote: user empathy map or user journey map

curation_notes.summary: Kept the intervention layer close to validated-learning discipline, beachhead scoping, and anti-vanity-metric safeguards.
donor_drops: Did not preserve startup-advice sprawl because the raw source is strongest on hypothesis testing and evidence-linked pivot rules.
open_questions: The third premortem question is reviewed compression from the continuation-pivot-kill surface rather than a direct labeled prompt.

allies: The raw allies section is especially strong on design thinking and hypothesis-driven problem solving.
antagonists: The source carries real anti-pattern pressure from status-quo and commitment-style persistence errors.
structured_tensions: The raw source names explicit tensions against commitment-bias and status-quo-bias.
